data.description: META HAS DELAYED THE RELEASE OF ITS NEW AI MODEL "AVOCADO" AFTER INTERNAL TESTING REVEALED IT LAGGED BEHIND RIVAL MODELS FROM GOOGLE, OPENAI, AND ANTHROPIC IN REASONING, CODING, AND WRITING PERFORMANCE.
THE UNITED STATES, JAPAN AND THE EUROPEAN UNION ARE ADVANCING TALKS ON A CRITICAL MINERALS TRADE AGREEMENT THAT MAY INCLUDE A PRICE FLOOR AND TARIFFS TO COUNTER MARKET DISTORTIONS FROM CHINA.

data.title: Caring for the Waters That Shape the Tennessee River Valley: Volunteers Mobilize for 2026 Spring Cleanups
data.description: In Norris, Tennessee on March 12, 2026, the Tennessee River Valley Stewardship Council urges people to safeguard the area's waterways and pathways as spring arrives. They encourage participation in volunteer cleanup efforts to preserve the region's rivers, lakes, and trails.
JAPAN'S BENCHMARK 10-YEAR JGB FUTURES FELL 0.28 POINTS IN EARLY TRADE.
META HAS POSTPONED THE RELEASE OF ITS AVOCADO PROJECT UNTIL AT LEAST MAY, PUSHING IT BACK FROM ITS ORIGINALLY PLANNED MARCH LAUNCH, ACCORDING TO THE NEW YORK TIMES.
TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT CLARIFIED THAT THE MEASURE APPLIES ONLY TO RUSSIAN OIL ALREADY IN TRANSIT AND WILL NOT PROVIDE SIGNIFICANT FINANCIAL BENEFIT TO THE RUSSIAN GOVERNMENT.
TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT STATED THAT THE TEMPORARY RISE IN OIL PRICES IS A SHORT-TERM DISRUPTION THAT WILL RESULT IN A "MASSIVE BENEFIT" TO THE U.S. ECONOMY IN THE LONG TERM.
GOLD STEADIED NEAR $5,080 AN OUNCE AFTER A TWO-DAY DROP AS THE WAR BETWEEN THE UNITED STATES AND IRAN PUSHED OIL PRICES HIGHER AND FUELED INFLATION CONCERNS.

data.title: DTCC tests T+5 settlement with The Graph GRT for data; achieves near-instant repo settlement on blockchain.
data.description: The Great Collateral Experiment by DTCC successfully achieved nearly instantaneous repo settlement using blockchain technology, with The Graph's subgraphs playing a key role in providing essential data. This groundbreaking initiative saw significant improvement in settlement times, showing the potential for a more efficient financial system.

data.title: REJURAN COSMETICS Debuts at Sephora, Expanding Its Footprint Across the U.S. Market
data.description: The leading medical aesthetic brand from Korea, REJURAN COSMETICS, has been launched both online and in 380 Sephora offline stores. This brand, developed by the renowned global pharmaceutical biotechnology company PharmaResearch, has taken this step as part of its expansion plans. The launch, which took place on March 12, 2026, aims to reach a wider audience and make the brand more accessible. This move is significant as it introduces a popular brand to a larger market, with the number of physical stores ensuring a broad reach across various locations.

data.title: Westbridge Renewable Energy Corp. Announces Planned Continuation to Luxembourg
data.description: Today, Westbridge Renewable Energy Corporation (TSXV: WEB) (OTCQX: WEGYF) (FRA: PUQ) revealed plans to relocate its corporate headquarters from British Columbia to another location. This move signifies a significant shift for the company.
TREASURY: LICENSE AUTHORIZING SALE OF CRUDE OIL FROM RUSSIA
U.S. HAS ISSUED A NEW RUSSIA-RELATED GENERAL LICENSE PERMITTING THE SALE OF RUSSIAN CRUDE OIL AND PETROLEUM PRODUCTS LOADED ON VESSELS AS OF MARCH 12, ACCORDING TO THE TREASURY WEBSITE.
US license permits sale of such Russian crude oil and petroleum products until 12:01 AM ET on April 11 - Treasury website
